data.narrative:
Skyrora is a space & aerospace company at SPAC stage currently valued at $250M, having raised $66M to date. The valuation assessment draws on a peer set of 9 private companies in the same sector and similar valuation tier, including Skyryse ($1.1B Series C), Starcloud ($1.1B SPAC), Apex Space ($1.0B Series D), Stoke Space ($1.0B Series D), and Isar Aerospace ($1.0B Series C).

The peer-median method is applicable and yields an implied valuation of $1.0B. This median is anchored across the 9-company peer set, with a range spanning $274M to $1.1B. Public comparables anchoring was not applied; while 6 public Space & Aerospace tickers trade at a median P/S of 59.8x, Skyrora's revenue is not disclosed, precluding a revenue-multiple triangulation. 

The analysis supports a valuation range of $850M (low) to $1.15B (high), with a median of $1.0B. The current $250M valuation sits materially below this peer-derived range, reflecting either a significant early-stage or stage-discount relative to later-stage private peers, or potential differences in operational maturity and capital efficiency not captured in this peer sample. Key uncertainties include revenue traction, technical validation progress, and capital requirements to commercial launch—data points unavailable in the current file.
